assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: The response clearly recommends upgrading L4 pool first with blue-green approach and A100 pool separately with coordination around training jobs

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: The response uses a blue-green node pool approach rather than surge upgrade with maxSurge parameters for rolling replacement

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: The response does not mention GPU driver version compatibility or inference framework compatibility concerns

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: The response explicitly waits for training jobs to complete before upgrading the A100 pool and includes a script to check for running jobs

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: The response does not mention that GPU VMs don't support live migration or that pods will restart causing latency spikes

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: The response includes PodDisruptionBudgets for both inference workloads (80% minAvailable) and training workloads

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: The response does not address the issue that auto-scaler will create nodes at the old version during the upgrade process

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: The response does not mention testing driver and CUDA compatibility in staging environment before production upgrade
